headline: NATO Forces Increase Presence Along Eastern European Border
summary: Multiple NATO member states confirm significant troop movements in response to escalating regional tensions near Polish and Baltic borders.

headline: UK General Election Results Spark Coalition Negotiations
summary: No single party secures majority; Labour and Liberal Democrats begin formal coalition discussions as markets react cautiously.

headline: Magnitude 7.1 Earthquake Strikes Hokkaido — Tsunami Advisory Issued
summary: A powerful earthquake hit northern Japan triggering a coastal tsunami advisory. Evacuation orders in effect for 14 municipalities.

headline: US Federal Reserve Signals Three Rate Cuts Ahead of Summer
summary: Fed Chair testimony hints at aggressive monetary easing citing cooling inflation and rising Q1 2026 unemployment data.

headline: Australia Bushfire Season Worst in Decade — 600,000 Hectares Burned
summary: Fires across Queensland and New South Wales continue as emergency crews battle record temperatures and critically low humidity.

headline: Brazil President Faces Impeachment Vote After Corruption Allegations
summary: Congress prepares historic vote as protesters flood Brasilia. International observers cite constitutional concerns over evidence procedures.

headline: India Successfully Launches Lunar South Pole Mining Probe
summary: ISRO Chandrayaan-4 enters lunar orbit on schedule. Mission targets viable helium-3 deposits for future clean energy applications.

headline: Germany Announces Nuclear Energy Reversal — Six Plants Reactivated
summary: Berlin policy reversal follows energy security review. Green coalition collapses; snap elections expected within 60 days.

headline: Ukraine Reports Capture of Strategic Donetsk Logistics Hub
summary: Ukrainian forces claim control of key supply node cutting Russian resupply lines. Russian MoD denies significant territorial changes.

headline: China Imposes Sweeping Tariffs on US Tech Imports Exceeding $200 Billion
summary: Beijing retaliates against Washington semiconductor restrictions with broad tariffs covering processors and cloud services.

headline: Canada Declares Emergency Over Arctic Blizzard — 1.2M Without Power
summary: Record wind chill across Ontario and Quebec. National Guard deployed to 34 municipalities facing extended outages.

headline: Middle East Ceasefire Talks Resume in Cairo — 72-Hour Window Agreed
summary: Egypt-brokered negotiations achieve temporary ceasefire allowing aid convoys. Full permanent agreement remains elusive.

headline: African Union Unveils $80B Trans-Saharan Railway Network
summary: Historic infrastructure agreement signed by 22 nations promises Lagos-to-Algiers connection by 2035, boosting trade by 340%.

headline: South Korea Claims China Stole Next-Gen Battery Tech — Espionage Arrests
summary: Seoul intelligence arrests three nationals accused of transferring solid-state battery IP to state-linked Chinese firm. Beijing denies.

headline: Mexico-US Border: Viral Agent Misconduct Footage Confirmed as Deepfake
summary: Independent forensic analysts confirm widely-shared video used synthetic audio overlay. Social media amplification under investigation.
